plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Reusable dev workflow agents and skills: test running, branch creation, conventional commits, pull request management, Linear issue management, browser verification, and spec writing

plugins.name: meta-claude
plugins.description: Claude Code productivity skills: session chronicle (two-layered journal with functional chronicle and open-ended reflection), session export, and self-documentation for explaining features and capabilities

plugins.name: pm-workflow
plugins.description: Product management workflow skills: PRD writing, PRD evaluation, and product one-pagers

plugins.name: knowledge-commons
plugins.description: Generator for per-project knowledge graphs with cross-domain promotion: scaffolds a graph, a /process pipeline, and project-owned skills from a config-driven interview; promotes portable claims into a personal commons; propagates template fixes into already-generated skills
